evals.prompt: What are we waiting on this week?
evals.expected_output: An inline ranked report grouped by project, listing 'Waiting on @X by {date}' callouts and externally-assigned action items due in the next 7 days, with original-ask date and source-page wikilinks.

Default 30-day window report, grouped by project, with sections: Due this week, Due this month, Stale (>14 days no movement), Escalations recommended. Each item shows owed-by, ask, asked date, due date, source page.

evals.prompt: What's blocking the order-platform team — any external dependencies?
evals.expected_output: Scoped report for the order-platform project: open requests-to-others grouped by classification, plus a note on whether any escalation is overdue. Includes source-page links and frontmatter waiting_on entries.
